title: PowerPots *Unofficial Port*
description: This Mod is a port of FTB Power Pots 1.16.5 to more modern version
body:
**Introduction**

Welcome to the world of Tech, do you like botany puts but think its a little to slow. Do you have excess power but dont know what to do with it. Then Power Pots is your new friend, with tiered pots allowing a faster and more output.

It's an addon of botany pots

**Features**
- PowerPots adds in where you can double or more the speed and the output amount
- It's automatically Hopper pot
- uses any power to start producing the crops
- Crouch + Right click to open the gui for the upgrades that is limited to 3 slots
- The Tiers go up to 5

**Upgrades**

These Upgrades can be added into upgrade gui that can be open with crouch + right click but with Version 1.0.8 you can configure button in controls to open the GUI
- Speed upgrade - Increase speed in production
- Fortune upgrade - give a bonus amount on  top of the amout you get
- Energy upgrade - This makes the PowerPot power efficient
- Output upgrade - This can double the Amolunt you get from PowerPot

**Credits**

I'm giving credit to FTB for the idea so can port it this is link to the official https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-power-pots

and give a bit of credit to MtChloe05 but never added a recipes so i forked the project added in recipes
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/energy-pots

and credit to the creators of botany pots and bookshelf https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots
